summary: Fix calendar sync for Google Workspace accounts using web session auth.

fixed: Calendar sync now uses Google Calendar’s session API (SAPISIDHASH) with your signed-in cookies — the same auth path the calendar web app uses, so Work/Qantas calendars populate Upcoming reliably
iCal and DOM scraping remain as fallbacks when the API path is unavailable
Embedded calendar web views also fetch events via the session API during sync
changed: Upcoming window uses a full 7-day horizon through end of day
